mano_cua.result_summary: 拖拽条目后Item Click事件被意外触发：Console日志显示dragEnd后紧跟Item Click 94事件，导致条目选中状态被意外改变。dragStart显示Array(0)而之前Item Click应已选中item 94，说明React异步setState与拖拽事件存在竞态条件。拖拽操作不应触发click选中。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Console shows dragEnd fires then Item Click 94 fires immediately after drag, which toggles selection state unexpectedly. dragStart shows Array(0) even after Item Click should have set selectedItems to [94], confirming async setState race condition with drag events.
